boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Chain fails to supply pre-change callback source as required by STD-QUA-071-P
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-QUA-071-P requires pre-change callback source in evidence chain
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CALL-QUA-071 explicitly used post-change email thread instead of pre-change vendor master phone source
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Payment-release authority REL-QUA-071 present but pre-change gate open

final_answer: ESCALATE. CALL-QUA-071 confirms use of post-change email thread rather than pre-change vendor master phone source. STD-QUA-071-P requires the pre-change callback source to close the chain. All other gates satisfied by VM-QUA-071, BANK-QUA-071, and REL-QUA-071 but this defect remains open before execution.
